accepted_fixes: Real multi-stage controlled runs now produce portable stage, final-run, return and split-evaluation receipts.
Controlled stage receipts replay the event loop and bind trades, portfolio, NAV, receipt chain and engine identity.
FamilyContract and TrialConfig are separated and multiple real strategies can share one multiplicity family.
Experiment ledger persists complete canonical event payloads and supports cross-process load and append.
Transformation uses a controlled pure JSON DSL with separate feature, label and join artifacts.
Candidate bundle v4 replays execution and selected qualification artifacts.
Terminal local-date semantics and CI artifact publication are fixed.
Student-t numerical implementation passed independent SciPy comparison.

findings.title: Historical cost identity can diverge from actual execution costs
findings.impact: Cheap or zero-cost historical execution can be labelled with a different conservative cost-policy SHA and enter holdout statistics.
findings.minimum_fix: Pass complete ExecutionCostAssumptions into the controlled runner and derive portfolio costs, slippage, capacity and identity internally.

findings.title: Trial strategy definition is not proven to match each historical DecisionArtifact
findings.impact: Historical returns from strategy B can support a TrialConfig and prospective candidate labelled as strategy A.
findings.minimum_fix: Bind shared strategy definition/adapter identities and replayable per-stage DecisionArtifact payloads to TrialConfig and every stage receipt.

findings.title: Feature transformation can read label-only fields from shared raw bytes
findings.impact: A partition can be marked row-PIT-enforced while the feature directly contains a future label.
findings.minimum_fix: Add FEATURE_INPUT, LABEL_INPUT and KEY_ONLY source/field roles; derive availability from the actual source fields consumed by each feature.

findings.title: Dataset partition rows are not reconciled with SplitManifest rows
findings.impact: Training/label partitions and purge/holdout definitions can refer to different samples, entities or dates.
findings.minimum_fix: Create a canonical row-index receipt and require exact equality of sample_id, entity_id, observed_at and label_end_at with SplitManifest.

findings.title: Return horizons lack an explicit economic start and complete-period coverage
findings.impact: Endpoint-only or economically misaligned returns can be accepted for a declared label horizon.
findings.minimum_fix: Store period_start_session and period_end_session derived from consecutive portfolio states; verify a complete, gap-free period chain and separate feature observation time from return start.

findings.title: Return contributors come from target weights rather than actual portfolio exposure
findings.impact: Blocked or residual holdings can affect NAV while being absent from the contributor/exposure receipt used by statistical evaluation.
findings.minimum_fix: Derive exposure from actual positions, trades, blocked orders and marks; or use an explicit portfolio-date estimand without target-security contributors.

findings.title: Transformation config is hashed but does not affect transformation output
findings.minimum_fix: Remove config or allow explicit typed config references and reject unused keys.

findings.title: FRED exploratory slice is not reproducible from a clean repository
findings.minimum_fix: Add a small research runner, committed spec, artifact reference and compact exploratory report in a later small PR.

findings.title: Build, serialize and load paths repeat expensive replay
findings.minimum_fix: Separate structural verification from explicit replay and cache ReplayReceipt by immutable identity.

findings.title: Bundle embeds all artifacts as Base64 and scales linearly with data size
findings.minimum_fix: Use a content-addressed artifact manifest and explicit offline pack operation.

findings.title: Authoritative provider data, production calibration, independent anchor and A-share evidence-room receipt remain unavailable

required_current_pr_fixes: Bind actual execution costs to cost assumptions identity.
Bind TrialConfig strategy definition/adapter to every historical DecisionArtifact.
Isolate feature and label source-field roles.
Reconcile dataset row index exactly with SplitManifest.
Add explicit return period start/end and complete coverage.
Derive contributor/exposure evidence from actual holdings and trades.
next_small_pr_scope: one clean-clone reproducible real exploratory vertical slice
unverified: Exact 273-passed text from raw CI log tail
FRED 9-row raw snapshot, spec and temporary runner
